title: Time warping with Hellinger elasticity
summary: We consider a matching problem for time series with values in an arbitrary metric space, with the stretching penalty given by the Hellinger kernel. To optimize this matching, we introduce the Elastic Time Warping algorithm with a cubic computational complexity.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于任意度量空间中时间序列的匹配方法，使用Hellinger核作为拉伸惩罚，并引入了立方计算复杂度的弹性时间规整算法
AI.motivation: 解决任意度量空间中时间序列的匹配问题，传统方法在处理不同度量空间的时间序列匹配时存在局限性，需要一种更通用的匹配框架
AI.method: 采用Hellinger核作为时间序列拉伸的惩罚函数，提出了弹性时间规整算法，该算法具有立方计算复杂度，能够处理任意度量空间中的时间序列匹配
AI.result: 开发了一种通用的时间序列匹配算法，能够在任意度量空间中工作，通过Hellinger核有效处理时间序列的拉伸问题，算法复杂度为立方级别
AI.conclusion: 提出的弹性时间规整算法为任意度量空间中的时间序列匹配提供了一个有效的解决方案，Hellinger核作为拉伸惩罚函数具有良好的理论性质，立方复杂度在实际应用中具有可行性

title: Evoking User Memory: Personalizing LLM via Recollection-Familiarity Adaptive Retrieval
summary: Personalized large language models (LLMs) rely on memory retrieval to incorporate user-specific histories, preferences, and contexts. Existing approaches either overload the LLM by feeding all the user's past memory into the prompt, which is costly and unscalable, or simplify retrieval into a one-shot similarity search, which captures only surface matches. Cognitive science, however, shows that human memory operates through a dual process: Familiarity, offering fast but coarse recognition, and Recollection, enabling deliberate, chain-like reconstruction for deeply recovering episodic content. Current systems lack both the ability to perform recollection retrieval and mechanisms to adaptively switch between the dual retrieval paths, leading to either insufficient recall or the inclusion of noise. To address this, we propose RF-Mem (Recollection-Familiarity Memory Retrieval), a familiarity uncertainty-guided dual-path memory retriever. RF-Mem measures the familiarity signal through the mean score and entropy. High familiarity leads to the direct top-K Familiarity retrieval path, while low familiarity activates the Recollection path. In the Recollection path, the system clusters candidate memories and applies alpha-mix with the query to iteratively expand evidence in embedding space, simulating deliberate contextual reconstruction. This design embeds human-like dual-process recognition into the retriever, avoiding full-context overhead and enabling scalable, adaptive personalization. Experiments across three benchmarks and corpus scales demonstrate that RF-Mem consistently outperforms both one-shot retrieval and full-context reasoning under fixed budget and latency constraints. Our code can be found in the Reproducibility Statement.

AI.tldr: RF-Mem提出基于认知科学双过程理论（熟悉度-回忆）的记忆检索框架，通过熟悉度不确定性引导在快速熟悉度检索和深度回忆检索之间自适应切换，实现更高效、准确的个性化LLM记忆检索。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM个性化记忆检索方法存在两个极端：要么将所有用户记忆塞入提示（成本高、不可扩展），要么简化为一次性相似度搜索（只能捕捉表面匹配）。认知科学研究表明人类记忆通过熟悉度（快速但粗略）和回忆（深思熟虑、链式重建）双过程运作，而现有系统缺乏回忆检索能力和自适应切换机制。
AI.method: RF-Mem通过熟悉度信号（平均分数和熵）测量记忆熟悉程度。高熟悉度时采用直接top-K熟悉度检索路径；低熟悉度时激活回忆路径，对候选记忆进行聚类并通过alpha-mix与查询在嵌入空间迭代扩展证据，模拟深思熟虑的上下文重建。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试和不同语料规模上的实验表明，RF-Mem在固定预算和延迟约束下，始终优于一次性检索和全上下文推理方法。
AI.conclusion: RF-Mem将人类认知的双过程识别机制嵌入检索器，避免了全上下文开销，实现了可扩展、自适应的个性化记忆检索，为LLM个性化提供了更符合人类认知原理的解决方案。

title: Equitable Multi-Task Learning for AI-RANs
summary: AI-enabled Radio Access Networks (AI-RANs) are expected to serve heterogeneous users with time-varying learning tasks over shared edge resources. Ensuring equitable inference performance across these users requires adaptive and fair learning mechanisms. This paper introduces an online-within-online fair multi-task learning (OWO-FMTL) framework that ensures long-term equity across users. The method combines two learning loops: an outer loop updating the shared model across rounds and an inner loop rebalancing user priorities within each round with a lightweight primal-dual update. Equity is quantified via generalized alpha-fairness, allowing a trade-off between efficiency and fairness. The framework guarantees diminishing performance disparity over time and operates with low computational overhead suitable for edge deployment. Experiments on convex and deep learning tasks confirm that OWO-FMTL outperforms existing multi-task learning baselines under dynamic scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线-在线公平多任务学习框架，用于AI-RAN中异构用户间的公平资源分配，通过内外双循环机制保证长期公平性。
AI.motivation: AI-RAN需要为异构用户提供随时间变化的学习任务服务，但现有方法难以在共享边缘资源上保证用户间的公平推理性能，需要自适应且公平的学习机制。
AI.method: 提出OWO-FMTL框架，包含两个学习循环：外循环更新跨轮次的共享模型，内循环通过轻量级原始-对偶更新在每个轮次内重新平衡用户优先级，使用广义alpha公平性量化公平性。
AI.result: 该框架保证随时间递减的性能差异，计算开销低适合边缘部署，在凸优化和深度学习任务上的实验表明，在动态场景下优于现有多任务学习基线方法。
AI.conclusion: OWO-FMTL为AI-RAN中的异构用户提供了有效的公平多任务学习解决方案，平衡了效率与公平性，适合边缘计算环境部署。

title: Test-Driven AI Agent Definition (TDAD): Compiling Tool-Using Agents from Behavioral Specifications
summary: We present Test-Driven AI Agent Definition (TDAD), a methodology that treats agent prompts as compiled artifacts: engineers provide behavioral specifications, a coding agent converts them into executable tests, and a second coding agent iteratively refines the prompt until tests pass. Deploying tool-using LLM agents in production requires measurable behavioral compliance that current development practices cannot provide. Small prompt changes cause silent regressions, tool misuse goes undetected, and policy violations emerge only after deployment. To mitigate specification gaming, TDAD introduces three mechanisms: (1) visible/hidden test splits that withhold evaluation tests during compilation, (2) semantic mutation testing via a post-compilation agent that generates plausible faulty prompt variants, with the harness measuring whether the test suite detects them, and (3) spec evolution scenarios that quantify regression safety when requirements change. We evaluate TDAD on SpecSuite-Core, a benchmark of four deeply-specified agents spanning policy compliance, grounded analytics, runbook adherence, and deterministic enforcement. Across 24 independent trials, TDAD achieves 92% v1 compilation success with 97% mean hidden pass rate; evolved specifications compile at 58%, with most failed runs passing all visible tests except 1-2, and show 86-100% mutation scores, 78% v2 hidden pass rate, and 97% regression safety scores. The implementation is available as an open benchmark at https://github.com/f-labs-io/tdad-paper-code.

AI.tldr: TDAD是一种将AI智能体提示视为编译产物的方法，通过工程师提供行为规范，编码智能体生成可执行测试，再由第二个编码智能体迭代优化提示直至测试通过，以解决生产环境中LLM智能体行为合规性难以测量的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前开发实践无法为生产环境中部署的工具使用型LLM智能体提供可测量的行为合规性保证。小的提示更改可能导致静默回归，工具误用难以检测，政策违规往往在部署后才显现。
AI.method: TDAD将智能体提示视为编译产物，工程师提供行为规范，第一个编码智能体将其转换为可执行测试，第二个编码智能体迭代优化提示直至测试通过。为防止规范博弈，引入三种机制：1)可见/隐藏测试分割；2)通过后编译智能体进行语义突变测试；3)规范演化场景量化需求变更时的回归安全性。
AI.result: 在SpecSuite-Core基准测试中，TDAD在24个独立试验中实现了92%的v1编译成功率，平均隐藏测试通过率97%；演化规范编译成功率58%，突变得分86-100%，v2隐藏通过率78%，回归安全得分97%。
AI.conclusion: TDAD提供了一种系统化的方法来确保AI智能体的行为合规性，通过测试驱动的开发方法显著提高了智能体提示的可靠性和可维护性，为生产环境部署提供了可测量的行为保证。

title: MASEval: Extending Multi-Agent Evaluation from Models to Systems
summary:
The rapid adoption of LLM-based agentic systems has produced a rich ecosystem of frameworks (smolagents, LangGraph, AutoGen, CAMEL, LlamaIndex, i.a.). Yet existing benchmarks are model-centric: they fix the agentic setup and do not compare other system components. We argue that implementation decisions substantially impact performance, including choices such as topology, orchestration logic, and error handling. MASEval addresses this evaluation gap with a framework-agnostic library that treats the entire system as the unit of analysis. Through a systematic system-level comparison across 3 benchmarks, 3 models, and 3 frameworks, we find that framework choice matters as much as model choice. MASEval allows researchers to explore all components of agentic systems, opening new avenues for principled system design, and practitioners to identify the best implementation for their use case.
  MASEval is available under the MIT licence https://github.com/parameterlab/MASEval.

AI.tldr: MASEval是一个框架无关的评估库，用于系统级比较LLM智能体系统的性能，发现框架选择与模型选择同等重要。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要是模型中心的，固定了智能体设置而不比较其他系统组件。作者认为实现决策（如拓扑结构、编排逻辑、错误处理）会显著影响性能，但缺乏相应的评估方法。
AI.method: 开发了MASEval框架无关的评估库，将整个系统作为分析单元。通过系统级比较，涵盖3个基准测试、3个模型和3个框架，评估不同组件对性能的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现框架选择与模型选择同等重要，不同的实现决策会显著影响智能体系统的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: MASEval填补了智能体系统评估的空白，为研究人员提供了探索所有系统组件的工具，为从业者识别最佳实现方案，推动了系统设计的规范化发展。

title: OptEMA: Adaptive Exponential Moving Average for Stochastic Optimization with Zero-Noise Optimality
summary: The Exponential Moving Average (EMA) is a cornerstone of widely used optimizers such as Adam. However, existing theoretical analyses of Adam-style methods have notable limitations: their guarantees can remain suboptimal in the zero-noise regime, rely on restrictive boundedness conditions (e.g., bounded gradients or objective gaps), use constant or open-loop stepsizes, or require prior knowledge of Lipschitz constants. To overcome these bottlenecks, we introduce OptEMA and analyze two novel variants: OptEMA-M, which applies an adaptive, decreasing EMA coefficient to the first-order moment with a fixed second-order decay, and OptEMA-V, which swaps these roles. Crucially, OptEMA is closed-loop and Lipschitz-free in the sense that its effective stepsizes are trajectory-dependent and do not require the Lipschitz constant for parameterization. Under standard stochastic gradient descent (SGD) assumptions, namely smoothness, a lower-bounded objective, and unbiased gradients with bounded variance, we establish rigorous convergence guarantees. Both variants achieve a noise-adaptive convergence rate of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2}+σ^{1/2} T^{-1/4})$ for the average gradient norm, where $σ$ is the noise level. In particular, in the zero-noise regime where $σ=0$, our bounds reduce to the nearly optimal deterministic rate $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2})$ without manual hyperparameter retuning.

AI.tldr: OptEMA提出了两种新的Adam风格优化器变体，通过自适应调整EMA系数，在无需Lipschitz常数的情况下实现了噪声自适应的收敛速率，在零噪声情况下达到接近最优的确定性收敛率。
AI.motivation: 现有Adam风格方法的理论分析存在多个局限性：在零噪声情况下保证可能不最优、依赖限制性有界条件、使用恒定或开环步长、需要Lipschitz常数先验知识。需要克服这些瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出了OptEMA优化器及其两种变体：OptEMA-M（对一阶矩应用自适应递减EMA系数，固定二阶衰减）和OptEMA-V（交换这些角色）。OptEMA是闭环且无需Lipschitz常数的，其有效步长依赖于轨迹。
AI.result: 在标准SGD假设下，两种变体都实现了噪声自适应的收敛速率$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2}+σ^{1/2} T^{-1/4})$，其中σ是噪声水平。特别地，在σ=0的零噪声情况下，收敛率简化为接近最优的确定性速率$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2})$，无需手动超参数调整。
AI.conclusion: OptEMA通过创新的自适应EMA系数设计，克服了现有Adam风格优化器理论分析的多个限制，实现了无需Lipschitz常数先验知识的噪声自适应收敛性能，在零噪声情况下达到接近最优的收敛速率。

title: Hindsight Credit Assignment for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents often face significant credit assignment challenges in long-horizon, multi-step tasks due to sparse rewards. Existing value-free methods, such as Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), encounter two fundamental bottlenecks: inaccurate step-level Q-value estimation and misaligned value baselines for intermediate states. To address these limitations, we introduce HCAPO, the first framework to integrate hindsight credit assignment into LLM agents. HCAPO leverages the LLM itself as a post-hoc critic to refine step-level Q-values through hindsight reasoning. Furthermore, HCAPO's multi-scale advantage mechanism effectively supplements the inaccurate value baselines at critical decision states. Evaluations across three challenging benchmarks, including WebShop and ALFWorld, demonstrate that HCAPO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art RL methods. Notably, HCAPO achieves a 7.7% improvement in success rate on WebShop and a 13.8% on ALFWorld over GRPO using the Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct model. These results indicate that HCAPO significantly enhances exploration efficiency, promotes concise decision-making, and ensures scalability in complex, long-horizon tasks.

AI.tldr: HCAPO框架将事后信用分配引入LLM智能体，解决长时程多步任务中的信用分配问题，通过LLM作为事后评论家优化步级Q值估计，并使用多尺度优势机制补充不准确的价值基线。
AI.motivation: 现有无价值方法（如GRPO）在长时程多步任务中面临两个基本瓶颈：不准确的步级Q值估计和中间状态的价值基线错位，导致稀疏奖励下的信用分配挑战。
AI.method: HCAPO框架将事后信用分配集成到LLM智能体中，利用LLM本身作为事后评论家，通过事后推理优化步级Q值，并采用多尺度优势机制补充关键决策状态的不准确价值基线。
AI.result: 在WebShop、ALFWorld等三个挑战性基准测试中，HCAPO始终优于最先进的RL方法。使用Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct模型时，HCAPO在WebShop上成功率比GRPO提高7.7%，在ALFWorld上提高13.8%。
AI.conclusion: HCAPO显著提升了探索效率，促进了简洁的决策制定，并确保了在复杂长时程任务中的可扩展性，为解决LLM智能体的信用分配问题提供了有效框架。

title: GenAI Is No Silver Bullet for Qualitative Research in Software Engineering
summary: Qualitative research gives rich insights into the quintessentially human aspects of software engineering as a socio-technical system. Qualitative research spans diverse strategies and methods, from interpretivist, in situ observational field studies, to deductive coding of data from mining studies. Advances in large language models and generative AI (GenAI) have prompted claims that artificial intelligence could automate qualitative analysis. Such claims are overgeneralizing from narrow successes. GenAI support must be carefully adapted to the data of interest, but also to the characteristics of a particular research strategy. In this Frontiers of SE paper, we discuss the emerging use of GenAI in relation to the broad spectrum of qualitative research in software engineering. We outline the dimensions of qualitative work in software engineering, review emerging empirical evidence for GenAI assistance, examine the pros and cons of GenAI-mediated qualitative research practices, and revisit qualitative research quality factors, in light of GenAI. Our goal is to inform researchers about the promises and pitfalls of GenAI-assisted qualitative research. We conclude with future plans to advance understanding of its use in software engineering.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了生成式AI在软件工程定性研究中的应用，分析了其潜力与局限，强调需要根据具体研究策略和数据特点进行适配。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型和生成式AI的发展，出现了AI可以自动化定性分析的说法，但这些说法往往过度概括了有限的成功案例。需要系统评估GenAI在软件工程定性研究中的实际应用价值。
AI.method: 通过讨论GenAI在软件工程定性研究中的新兴应用，概述定性工作的维度，回顾GenAI辅助的实证证据，分析GenAI介导的定性研究实践的利弊，并重新审视定性研究质量因素。
AI.result: GenAI支持需要根据具体数据和特定研究策略的特点进行精心适配，不能一概而论。需要权衡GenAI辅助研究的优势与潜在风险。
AI.conclusion: 本文旨在告知研究者GenAI辅助定性研究的承诺与陷阱，并计划未来进一步推进对其在软件工程中应用的理解。

title: MITRA: An AI Assistant for Knowledge Retrieval in Physics Collaborations
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2025 Machine Learning for the Physical Sciences workshop and Lepton Photon conference 2025 (Computing AI/ML track)
summary: Large-scale scientific collaborations, such as the Compact Muon Solenoid (CMS) at CERN, produce a vast and ever-growing corpus of internal documentation. Navigating this complex information landscape presents a significant challenge for both new and experienced researchers, hindering knowledge sharing and slowing down the pace of scientific discovery. To address this, we present a prototype of MITRA, a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) based system, designed to answer specific, context-aware questions about physics analyses. MITRA employs a novel, automated pipeline using Selenium for document retrieval from internal databases and Optical Character Recognition (OCR) with layout parsing for high-fidelity text extraction. Crucially, MITRA's entire framework, from the embedding model to the Large Language Model (LLM), is hosted on-premise, ensuring that sensitive collaboration data remains private. We introduce a two-tiered vector database architecture that first identifies the relevant analysis from abstracts before focusing on the full documentation, resolving potential ambiguities between different analyses. We demonstrate the prototype's superior retrieval performance against a standard keyword-based baseline on realistic queries and discuss future work towards developing a comprehensive research agent for large experimental collaborations.

title: Generalized Reduction to the Isotropy for Flexible Equivariant Neural Fields
summary: Many geometric learning problems require invariants on heterogeneous product spaces, i.e., products of distinct spaces carrying different group actions, where standard techniques do not directly apply. We show that, when a group $G$ acts transitively on a space $M$, any $G$-invariant function on a product space $X \times M$ can be reduced to an invariant of the isotropy subgroup $H$ of $M$ acting on $X$ alone. Our approach establishes an explicit orbit equivalence $(X \times M)/G \cong X/H$, yielding a principled reduction that preserves expressivity. We apply this characterization to Equivariant Neural Fields, extending them to arbitrary group actions and homogeneous conditioning spaces, and thereby removing the major structural constraints imposed by existing methods.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种在异构乘积空间上构建不变量的新方法，通过轨道等价将群作用下的函数约简为等变子群作用，扩展了等变神经场的适用范围。
AI.motivation: 许多几何学习问题需要在异构乘积空间（不同群作用的空间乘积）上构建不变量，但标准技术无法直接应用。现有方法对等变神经场施加了主要的结构约束。
AI.method: 当群G在空间M上可迁作用时，证明任何在乘积空间X×M上的G-不变函数可以约简为M的等变子群H在X上的不变量。建立明确的轨道等价关系(X×M)/G ≅ X/H，提供保持表达能力的原理性约简。
AI.result: 该方法将等变神经场扩展到任意群作用和齐次条件空间，消除了现有方法施加的主要结构约束，为异构乘积空间上的几何学习提供了通用框架。
AI.conclusion: 通过轨道等价约简异构乘积空间上的不变量，为处理不同群作用的空间乘积提供了理论基础，显著扩展了等变神经场的应用范围，解决了几何学习中长期存在的结构约束问题。

title: Quantifying the Accuracy and Cost Impact of Design Decisions in Budget-Constrained Agentic LLM Search
comment: Accepted in 2026 Language Resources and Evaluation Conference (LREC)
summary: Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems combine iterative search, planning prompts, and retrieval backends, but deployed settings impose explicit budgets on tool calls and completion tokens. We present a controlled measurement study of how search depth, retrieval strategy, and completion budget affect accuracy and cost under fixed constraints. Using Budget-Constrained Agentic Search (BCAS), a model-agnostic evaluation harness that surfaces remaining budget and gates tool use, we run comparisons across six LLMs and three question-answering benchmarks. Across models and datasets, accuracy improves with additional searches up to a small cap, hybrid lexical and dense retrieval with lightweight re-ranking produces the largest average gains in our ablation grid, and larger completion budgets are most helpful on HotpotQA-style synthesis. These results provide practical guidance for configuring budgeted agentic retrieval pipelines and are accompanied by reproducible prompts and evaluation settings.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了预算约束下的智能检索增强生成系统，通过BCAS评估框架分析搜索深度、检索策略和完成预算对准确性和成本的影响，为实际部署提供配置指导。
AI.motivation: 智能RAG系统在实际部署中面临明确的工具调用和完成token预算限制，需要了解不同配置参数如何在固定约束下影响系统性能和成本。
AI.method: 提出Budget-Constrained Agentic Search (BCAS)评估框架，这是一个模型无关的评估工具，能够监控剩余预算并控制工具使用。在六个LLM和三个问答基准上进行比较实验，分析搜索深度、检索策略和完成预算的影响。
AI.result: 准确性随搜索次数增加而提高，但存在小上限；混合词汇和密集检索结合轻量级重排带来最大平均增益；较大的完成预算在HotpotQA式合成任务中最有帮助。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为配置预算约束的智能检索管道提供了实用指导，并提供了可复现的提示和评估设置。

title: SPREAD: Subspace Representation Distillation for Lifelong Imitation Learning
comment: IEEE International Conference on Robotics & Automation (ICRA) 2026
summary: A key challenge in lifelong imitation learning (LIL) is enabling agents to acquire new skills from expert demonstrations while retaining prior knowledge. This requires preserving the low-dimensional manifolds and geometric structures that underlie task representations across sequential learning. Existing distillation methods, which rely on L2-norm feature matching in raw feature space, are sensitive to noise and high-dimensional variability, often failing to preserve intrinsic task manifolds. To address this, we introduce SPREAD, a geometry-preserving framework that employs singular value decomposition (SVD) to align policy representations across tasks within low-rank subspaces. This alignment maintains the underlying geometry of multimodal features, facilitating stable transfer, robustness, and generalization. Additionally, we propose a confidence-guided distillation strategy that applies a Kullback-Leibler divergence loss restricted to the top-M most confident action samples, emphasizing reliable modes and improving optimization stability. Experiments on the LIBERO, lifelong imitation learning benchmark, show that SPREAD substantially improves knowledge transfer, mitigates catastrophic forgetting, and achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: SPREAD是一个终身模仿学习框架，通过奇异值分解在低秩子空间中对齐策略表示，保持任务流形的几何结构，并使用置信度引导的蒸馏策略提高优化稳定性。
AI.motivation: 终身模仿学习的关键挑战是让智能体从专家演示中学习新技能的同时保留先验知识。现有基于L2范数特征匹配的蒸馏方法对噪声和高维变化敏感，难以保持任务流形的内在几何结构。
AI.method: 提出SPREAD框架：1) 使用奇异值分解在低秩子空间中对齐策略表示，保持多模态特征的底层几何结构；2) 提出置信度引导的蒸馏策略，将KL散度损失限制在置信度最高的前M个动作样本上，强调可靠模式。
AI.result: 在LIBERO终身模仿学习基准测试中，SPREAD显著改善了知识迁移，缓解了灾难性遗忘，并实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: SPREAD通过几何保持的特征对齐和置信度引导的蒸馏，有效解决了终身模仿学习中的知识保留和迁移问题，为保持任务流形的几何结构提供了新方法。

title: Interpretable Markov-Based Spatiotemporal Risk Surfaces for Missing-Child Search Planning with Reinforcement Learning and LLM-Based Quality Assurance
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures. Accepted at ICEIS 2026 (International Conference on Enterprise Information Systems)
summary: The first 72 hours of a missing-child investigation are critical for successful recovery. However, law enforcement agencies often face fragmented, unstructured data and a lack of dynamic, geospatial predictive tools. Our system, Guardian, provides an end-to-end decision-support system for missing-child investigation and early search planning. It converts heterogeneous, unstructured case documents into a schema-aligned spatiotemporal representation, enriches cases with geocoding and transportation context, and provides probabilistic search products spanning 0-72 hours. In this paper, we present an overview of Guardian as well as a detailed description of a three-layer predictive component of the system. The first layer is a Markov chain, a sparse, interpretable model with transitions incorporating road accessibility costs, seclusion preferences, and corridor bias with separate day/night parameterizations. The Markov chain's output prediction distributions are then transformed into operationally useful search plans by the second layer's reinforcement learning. Finally, the third layer's LLM performs post hoc validation of layer 2 search plans prior to their release. Using a synthetic but realistic case study, we report quantitative outputs across 24/48/72-hour horizons and analyze sensitivity, failure modes, and tradeoffs. Results show that the proposed predictive system with the three-layer architecture produces interpretable priors for zone optimization and human review.

AI.tldr: Guardian系统是一个用于失踪儿童调查的端到端决策支持系统，通过三层预测架构（马尔可夫链、强化学习、LLM验证）生成可解释的搜索计划。
AI.motivation: 失踪儿童调查的前72小时至关重要，但执法机构面临数据碎片化、非结构化以及缺乏动态地理空间预测工具的问题。
AI.method: 系统将异构非结构化案件文档转换为时空表示，通过三层预测架构：第一层使用考虑道路可达性、隐蔽偏好和昼夜参数的马尔可夫链；第二层用强化学习将预测分布转化为可操作的搜索计划；第三层用LLM进行事后验证。
AI.result: 使用合成但真实的案例研究，系统在24/48/72小时时间范围内产生定量输出，结果显示三层架构能产生用于区域优化和人工审查的可解释先验概率。
AI.conclusion: Guardian系统提供了一个完整的决策支持框架，通过结合可解释模型和操作化工具，为失踪儿童调查提供有效的预测搜索计划。

title: Overview of the TREC 2025 Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) Track
summary: The second edition of the TREC Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) Track advances research on systems that integrate retrieval and generation to address complex, real-world information needs. Building on the foundation of the inaugural 2024 track, this year's challenge introduces long, multi-sentence narrative queries to better reflect the deep search task with the growing demand for reasoning-driven responses. Participants are tasked with designing pipelines that combine retrieval and generation while ensuring transparency and factual grounding. The track leverages the MS MARCO V2.1 corpus and employs a multi-layered evaluation framework encompassing relevance assessment, response completeness, attribution verification, and agreement analysis. By emphasizing multi-faceted narratives and attribution-rich answers from over 150 submissions this year, the TREC 2025 RAG Track aims to foster innovation in creating trustworthy, context-aware systems for retrieval augmented generation.

AI.tldr: TREC 2025 RAG Track聚焦于检索增强生成系统，通过引入长篇多句叙事查询来模拟真实复杂信息需求，强调透明度、事实基础和归因验证。
AI.motivation: 随着对推理驱动响应的需求增长，需要更好地反映深度搜索任务，设计能够处理复杂、真实世界信息需求的检索增强生成系统。
AI.method: 使用MS MARCO V2.1语料库，引入长篇多句叙事查询，要求参与者设计结合检索和生成的管道，采用多层评估框架包括相关性评估、响应完整性、归因验证和一致性分析。
AI.result: 今年收到超过150份提交，通过强调多层面叙事和富含归因的答案，推动了检索增强生成系统的创新。
AI.conclusion: TREC 2025 RAG Track旨在促进创建可信赖、上下文感知的检索增强生成系统，推动该领域的研究发展。

title: Multi-level meta-reinforcement learning with skill-based curriculum
summary: We consider problems in sequential decision making with natural multi-level structure, where sub-tasks are assembled together to accomplish complex goals. Systematically inferring and leveraging hierarchical structure has remained a longstanding challenge; we describe an efficient multi-level procedure for repeatedly compressing Markov decision processes (MDPs), wherein a parametric family of policies at one level is treated as single actions in the compressed MDPs at higher levels, while preserving the semantic meanings and structure of the original MDP, and mimicking the natural logic to address a complex MDP. Higher-level MDPs are themselves independent MDPs with less stochasticity, and may be solved using existing algorithms. As a byproduct, spatial or temporal scales may be coarsened at higher levels, making it more efficient to find long-term optimal policies. The multi-level representation delivered by this procedure decouples sub-tasks from each other and usually greatly reduces unnecessary stochasticity and the policy search space, leading to fewer iterations and computations when solving the MDPs. A second fundamental aspect of this work is that these multi-level decompositions plus the factorization of policies into embeddings (problem-specific) and skills (including higher-order functions) yield new transfer opportunities of skills across different problems and different levels. This whole process is framed within curriculum learning, wherein a teacher organizes the student agent's learning process in a way that gradually increases the difficulty of tasks and and promotes transfer across MDPs and levels within and across curricula. The consistency of this framework and its benefits can be guaranteed under mild assumptions. We demonstrate abstraction, transferability, and curriculum learning in examples, including MazeBase+, a more complex variant of the MazeBase example.

AI.tldr: 提出一种多级马尔可夫决策过程压缩方法，通过分层抽象减少随机性和策略搜索空间，结合课程学习实现技能跨问题和跨层级迁移
AI.motivation: 解决具有自然多层次结构的顺序决策问题，传统方法难以系统推断和利用层次结构，需要一种能保持语义、减少随机性、支持技能迁移的高效方法
AI.method: 多级MDP压缩框架：将低层策略族视为高层MDP中的单一动作，保持原始MDP语义结构；高层MDP具有更少随机性，可独立求解；结合嵌入（问题特定）和技能（高阶函数）的因子分解
AI.result: 多级表示解耦子任务，显著减少不必要随机性和策略搜索空间，降低迭代和计算成本；技能可跨不同问题和层级迁移；在MazeBase+等示例中验证了抽象、可迁移性和课程学习效果
AI.conclusion: 该框架在温和假设下保证一致性，通过多级分解和课程学习有效解决复杂MDP问题，实现高效策略搜索和技能迁移，为层次强化学习提供系统化方法

title: Automating Detection and Root-Cause Analysis of Flaky Tests in Quantum Software
summary:
Like classical software, quantum software systems rely on automated testing. However, their inherently probabilistic outputs make them susceptible to quantum flakiness -- tests that pass or fail inconsistently without code changes. Such quantum flaky tests can mask real defects and reduce developer productivity, yet systematic tooling for their detection and diagnosis remains limited.
  This paper presents an automated pipeline to detect flaky-test-related issues and pull requests in quantum software repositories and to support the identification of their root causes. We aim to expand an existing quantum flaky test dataset and evaluate the capability of Large Language Models (LLMs) for flakiness classification and root-cause identification.
  Building on a prior manual analysis of 14 quantum software repositories, we automate the discovery of additional flaky test cases using LLMs and cosine similarity. We further evaluate a variety of LLMs from OpenAI GPT, Meta LLaMA, Google Gemini, and Anthropic Claude suites for classifying flakiness and identifying root causes from issue descriptions and code context. Classification performance is assessed using standard performance metrics, including F1-score.
  Using our pipeline, we identify 25 previously unknown flaky tests, increasing the original dataset size by 54%. The best-performing model, Google Gemini, achieves an F1-score of 0.9420 for flakiness detection and 0.9643 for root-cause identification, demonstrating that LLMs can provide practical support for triaging flaky reports and understanding their underlying causes in quantum software.
  The expanded dataset and automated pipeline provide reusable artifacts for the quantum software engineering community. Future work will focus on improving detection robustness and exploring automated repair of quantum flaky tests.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一个自动化管道，用于检测量子软件中的不稳定测试，利用大语言模型进行分类和根因分析，将原有数据集扩展了54%，最佳模型在检测和根因识别方面都取得了超过0.94的F1分数。
AI.motivation: 量子软件测试具有固有的概率性输出，容易产生不稳定的测试结果（量子不稳定测试），这些测试会掩盖真实缺陷并降低开发效率，但目前缺乏系统化的检测和诊断工具。
AI.method: 基于先前对14个量子软件仓库的手动分析，使用大语言模型和余弦相似度自动化发现更多不稳定测试案例。评估了OpenAI GPT、Meta LLaMA、Google Gemini和Anthropic Claude等系列的大语言模型，用于从问题描述和代码上下文中分类不稳定性和识别根因。
AI.result: 通过自动化管道发现了25个先前未知的不稳定测试，将原始数据集大小增加了54%。最佳模型Google Gemini在不稳定性检测方面获得0.9420的F1分数，在根因识别方面获得0.9643的F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型能够为量子软件中不稳定报告的筛选和根因理解提供实际支持。扩展的数据集和自动化管道为量子软件工程社区提供了可重用的工具，未来工作将集中在提高检测鲁棒性和探索量子不稳定测试的自动修复。

title: AgentOS: From Application Silos to a Natural Language-Driven Data Ecosystem
summary: The rapid emergence of open-source, locally hosted intelligent agents marks a critical inflection point in human-computer interaction. Systems such as OpenClaw demonstrate that Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents can autonomously operate local computing environments, orchestrate workflows, and integrate external tools. However, within the current paradigm, these agents remain conventional applications running on legacy operating systems originally designed for Graphical User Interfaces (GUIs) or Command Line Interfaces (CLIs). This architectural mismatch leads to fragmented interaction models, poorly structured permission management (often described as "Shadow AI"), and severe context fragmentation. This paper proposes a new paradigm: a Personal Agent Operating System (AgentOS). In AgentOS, traditional GUI desktops are replaced by a Natural User Interface (NUI) centered on a unified natural language or voice portal. The system core becomes an Agent Kernel that interprets user intent, decomposes tasks, and coordinates multiple agents, while traditional applications evolve into modular Skills-as-Modules enabling users to compose software through natural language rules. We argue that realizing AgentOS fundamentally becomes a Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD) problem. The Agent Kernel must operate as a real-time engine for intent mining and knowledge discovery. Viewed through this lens, the operating system becomes a continuous data mining pipeline involving sequential pattern mining for workflow automation, recommender systems for skill retrieval, and dynamically evolving personal knowledge graphs. These challenges define a new research agenda for the KDD community in building the next generation of intelligent computing systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的个人智能体操作系统（AgentOS），旨在解决当前基于LLM的智能体在传统操作系统架构下的交互碎片化、权限管理混乱和上下文割裂等问题，将操作系统重构为以自然语言为中心、以智能体内核为核心、以技能模块为组件的全新计算范式。
AI.motivation: 当前开源本地智能体（如OpenClaw）虽然展示了LLM智能体自主操作本地计算环境的能力，但它们仍然运行在最初为GUI/CLI设计的传统操作系统上。这种架构不匹配导致了：1）碎片化的交互模型；2）权限管理混乱（常被称为"影子AI"）；3）严重的上下文割裂。因此需要从根本上重新思考操作系统架构。
AI.method: 提出AgentOS新范式：1）用自然用户界面（NUI）取代传统GUI桌面，建立统一的自然语言/语音门户；2）核心是智能体内核，负责解释用户意图、分解任务、协调多个智能体；3）传统应用演变为模块化技能模块，用户可通过自然语言规则组合软件；4）将AgentOS实现视为知识发现与数据挖掘问题，智能体内核作为实时意图挖掘和知识发现引擎。
AI.result: 将操作系统重构为连续的数据挖掘管道，涉及：1）工作流自动化的序列模式挖掘；2）技能检索的推荐系统；3）动态演化的个人知识图谱。这为KDD社区定义了新的研究议程，用于构建下一代智能计算系统。
AI.conclusion: AgentOS代表了从传统应用为中心到以智能体为中心的计算范式转变，其核心实现本质上是KDD问题。这种新架构能够解决当前智能体系统的根本性限制，为构建真正智能、集成、上下文感知的个人计算环境提供了理论框架和技术路径。

title: A Voronoi Cell Formulation for Principled Token Pruning in Late-Interaction Retrieval Models
summary: Late-interaction models like ColBERT offer a competitive performance across various retrieval tasks, but require storing a dense embedding for each document token, leading to a substantial index storage overhead. Past works address this by attempting to prune low-importance token embeddings based on statistical and empirical measures, but they often either lack formal grounding or are ineffective. To address these shortcomings, we introduce a framework grounded in hyperspace geometry and cast token pruning as a Voronoi cell estimation problem in the embedding space. By interpreting each token's influence as a measure of its Voronoi region, our approach enables principled pruning that retains retrieval quality while reducing index size. Through our experiments, we demonstrate that this approach serves not only as a competitive pruning strategy but also as a valuable tool for improving and interpreting token-level behavior within dense retrieval systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于超空间几何和Voronoi单元估计的token剪枝框架，用于减少ColBERT等延迟交互模型的索引存储开销，同时保持检索质量。
AI.motivation: ColBERT等延迟交互模型需要为每个文档token存储密集嵌入，导致显著的索引存储开销。现有剪枝方法缺乏理论依据或效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出基于超空间几何的框架，将token剪枝视为嵌入空间中的Voronoi单元估计问题，通过测量每个token的Voronoi区域影响来进行剪枝。
AI.result: 该方法不仅作为竞争性的剪枝策略，还能作为改进和解释密集检索系统中token级行为的工具，在减少索引大小的同时保持检索质量。
AI.conclusion: 基于Voronoi几何的token剪枝方法提供了理论依据，有效解决了延迟交互模型的存储开销问题，同时为理解token级行为提供了新视角。

title: The Temporal Markov Transition Field
summary: The Markov Transition Field (MTF), introduced by Wang and Oates (2015), encodes a time series as a two-dimensional image by mapping each pair of time steps to the transition probability between their quantile states, estimated from a single global transition matrix. This construction is efficient when the transition dynamics are stationary, but produces a misleading representation when the process changes regime over time: the global matrix averages across regimes and the resulting image loses all information about \emph{when} each dynamical regime was active. In this paper we introduce the \emph{Temporal Markov Transition Field} (TMTF), an extension that partitions the series into $K$ contiguous temporal chunks, estimates a separate local transition matrix for each chunk, and assembles the image so that each row reflects the dynamics local to its chunk rather than the global average. The resulting $T \times T$ image has $K$ horizontal bands of distinct texture, each encoding the transition dynamics of one temporal segment. We develop the formal definition, establish the key structural properties of the representation, work through a complete numerical example that makes the distinction from the global MTF concrete, analyse the bias--variance trade-off introduced by temporal chunking, and discuss the geometric interpretation of the local transition matrices in terms of process properties such as persistence, mean reversion, and trending behaviour. The TMTF is amplitude-agnostic and order-preserving, making it suitable as an input channel for convolutional neural networks applied to time series characterisation tasks.

AI.tldr: TMTF是MTF的扩展，通过将时间序列分段并估计局部转移矩阵，解决了MTF在非平稳过程中丢失时间信息的缺陷，为CNN提供更好的时间序列图像表示。
AI.motivation: 传统MTF方法在时间序列动态变化（如机制转换）时存在问题，全局转移矩阵会平均不同机制的信息，导致丢失每个动态机制何时活跃的时间信息。
AI.method: 将时间序列划分为K个连续的时间块，为每个块估计局部转移矩阵，然后组装成图像，使每一行反映其所在块的局部动态而非全局平均。
AI.result: 生成的T×T图像具有K个不同纹理的水平带，每个带编码一个时间段的转移动态。该方法具有振幅无关性和顺序保持性，适合作为CNN的输入通道。
AI.conclusion: TMTF扩展了MTF，通过局部化方法保留了时间信息，能更好地表征非平稳时间序列的动态变化，为基于CNN的时间序列分析提供了改进的图像表示。

title: The Future of Software Engineering Conferences: A New Zealand Perspective
summary: Software engineering (SE) conferences are vital for knowledge exchange and collaboration, yet can also involve significant barriers for researchers in geographically distant regions such as New Zealand. We identify barriers such as high travel costs, misaligned academic calendars, and limited representation, and propose strategies including hybrid participation, cost-conscious venues, and governance reforms. We make recommendations to promote equitable global participation and strengthen the SE research community.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了新西兰等地理偏远地区研究人员参与软件工程会议的障碍，提出了促进全球公平参与的策略建议。
AI.motivation: 软件工程会议对于知识交流和合作至关重要，但地理位置偏远地区（如新西兰）的研究人员面临显著参与障碍，包括高昂的旅行成本、学术日历不匹配和有限代表性等问题。
AI.method: 通过识别和分析软件工程会议参与的主要障碍，包括高旅行成本、学术日历错位和代表性不足，并基于这些分析提出具体的改进策略。
AI.result: 识别出三大主要障碍：1）高昂的旅行成本；2）学术日历不匹配；3）有限的地域代表性。提出了混合参与模式、成本敏感型会议选址和治理改革等具体策略。
AI.conclusion: 通过实施混合参与、选择成本敏感型会议地点和进行治理改革等策略，可以促进软件工程会议的全球公平参与，从而加强整个研究社区的建设。

title: A Consensus-Driven Multi-LLM Pipeline for Missing-Person Investigations
comment: Accepted to CAC: Applied Computing & Automation Conferences 2026. 16 pages, 6 figures
summary: The first 72 hours of a missing-person investigation are critical for successful recovery. Guardian is an end-to-end system designed to support missing-child investigation and early search planning. This paper presents the Guardian LLM Pipeline, a multi-model system in which LLMs are used for intelligent information extraction and processing related to missing-person search operations. The pipeline coordinates end-to-end execution across task-specialized LLM models and invokes a consensus LLM engine that compares multiple model outputs and resolves disagreements. The pipeline is further strengthened by QLoRA-based fine-tuning, using curated datasets. The presented design aligns with prior work on weak supervision and LLM-assisted annotation, emphasizing conservative, auditable use of LLMs as structured extractors and labelers rather than unconstrained end-to-end decision makers.

AI.tldr: Guardian是一个端到端系统，通过多模型LLM管道支持失踪儿童调查和早期搜索规划，使用QLoRA微调和共识机制提高信息提取的准确性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 失踪人员调查的前72小时对成功找回至关重要，需要智能系统支持早期搜索规划，提高调查效率。
AI.method: 采用多模型LLM管道，协调任务专用LLM模型进行端到端执行，引入共识LLM引擎比较多个模型输出并解决分歧，通过QLoRA微调使用精选数据集增强系统性能。
AI.result: 设计了一个保守、可审计的LLM使用框架，将LLM作为结构化提取器和标注器，而非不受约束的端到端决策者，与弱监督和LLM辅助标注的先前工作保持一致。
AI.conclusion: Guardian LLM管道为失踪儿童调查提供了智能信息提取和处理系统，通过多模型协调和共识机制确保可靠性和准确性，支持关键的早期搜索规划。

title: SoftJAX & SoftTorch: Empowering Automatic Differentiation Libraries with Informative Gradients
summary: Automatic differentiation (AD) frameworks such as JAX and PyTorch have enabled gradient-based optimization for a wide range of scientific fields. Yet, many "hard" primitives in these libraries such as thresholding, Boolean logic, discrete indexing, and sorting operations yield zero or undefined gradients that are not useful for optimization. While numerous "soft" relaxations have been proposed that provide informative gradients, the respective implementations are fragmented across projects, making them difficult to combine and compare. This work introduces SoftJAX and SoftTorch, open-source, feature-complete libraries for soft differentiable programming. These libraries provide a variety of soft functions as drop-in replacements for their hard JAX and PyTorch counterparts. This includes (i) elementwise operators such as clip or abs, (ii) utility methods for manipulating Booleans and indices via fuzzy logic, (iii) axiswise operators such as sort or rank -- based on optimal transport or permutahedron projections, and (iv) offer full support for straight-through gradient estimation. Overall, SoftJAX and SoftTorch make the toolbox of soft relaxations easily accessible to differentiable programming, as demonstrated through benchmarking and a practical case study. Code is available at github.com/a-paulus/softjax and github.com/a-paulus/softtorch.

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了SoftJAX和SoftTorch两个开源库，为JAX和PyTorch中的"硬"原语（如阈值、布尔逻辑、离散索引、排序等）提供软可微替代方案，解决这些操作梯度为零或未定义的问题。
AI.motivation: 自动微分框架（如JAX和PyTorch）中的许多"硬"原语（阈值、布尔逻辑、离散索引、排序等）会产生零梯度或未定义梯度，不利于优化。虽然已有各种"软"松弛方法提供信息梯度，但实现分散在不同项目中，难以组合和比较。
AI.method: 开发了SoftJAX和SoftTorch两个开源库，提供多种软函数作为硬JAX和PyTorch对应函数的直接替代品。包括：(i)逐元素操作符（如clip、abs），(ii)通过模糊逻辑操作布尔值和索引的实用方法，(iii)基于最优传输或置换多面体投影的轴向操作符（如排序、排名），(iv)支持直通梯度估计。
AI.result: 创建了功能完整的软可微编程库，使软松弛工具箱易于在可微编程中使用。通过基准测试和实际案例研究展示了其有效性。代码已在GitHub开源。
AI.conclusion: SoftJAX和SoftTorch为可微编程提供了易于访问的软松弛工具箱，解决了硬原语的梯度问题，促进了科学计算和机器学习中梯度优化方法的应用。

title: Class Model Generation from Requirements using Large Language Models
comment: Accepted by The Eighth Workshop on Modeling and Simulation of Software-Intensive Systems (MSSiS 2026), ICSE 2026
summary: The emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) has opened new opportunities to automate software engineering activities that traditionally require substantial manual effort. Among these, class diagram generation represents a critical yet resource-intensive phase in software design. This paper investigates the capabilities of state-of-the-art LLMs, including GPT-5, Claude Sonnet 4.0, Gemini 2.5 Flash Thinking, and Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, to generate UML class diagrams from natural language requirements automatically. To evaluate the effectiveness and reliability of LLM-based model generation, we propose a comprehensive dual-validation framework that integrates an LLM-as-a-Judge methodology with human-in-the-loop assessment. Using eight heterogeneous datasets, we apply chain-of-thought prompting to extract domain entities, attributes, and associations, generating corresponding PlantUML representations. The resulting models are evaluated across five quality dimensions: completeness, correctness, conformance to standards, comprehensibility, and terminological alignment. Two independent LLM judges (Grok and Mistral) perform structured pairwise comparisons, and their judgments are further validated against expert evaluations. Our results demonstrate that LLMs can generate structurally coherent and semantically meaningful UML diagrams, achieving substantial alignment with human evaluators. The consistency observed between LLM-based and human-based assessments highlights the potential of LLMs not only as modeling assistants but also as reliable evaluators in automated requirements engineering workflows, offering practical insights into the capabilities and limitations of LLM-driven UML class diagram automation.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了GPT-5、Claude Sonnet 4.0、Gemini 2.5 Flash Thinking和Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct等先进大语言模型从自然语言需求自动生成UML类图的能力，提出了结合LLM-as-a-Judge和人工评估的双重验证框架，结果表明LLM能够生成结构连贯、语义有意义的UML图，与人类评估高度一致。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型的出现为自动化传统需要大量人工工作的软件工程活动提供了新机会。类图生成是软件设计中关键但资源密集的阶段，需要探索LLM在此任务上的能力和可靠性。
AI.method: 研究采用链式思维提示从自然语言需求中提取领域实体、属性和关联，生成PlantUML表示。提出双重验证框架，结合LLM-as-a-Judge方法和人工评估，使用八个异构数据集，通过两个独立LLM法官（Grok和Mistral）进行结构化成对比较，并与专家评估进行验证。
AI.result: LLM能够生成结构连贯、语义有意义的UML类图，在完整性、正确性、标准符合性、可理解性和术语一致性五个质量维度上表现出色。LLM评估与人类评估之间存在显著一致性，表明LLM不仅可作为建模助手，还可作为自动化需求工程工作流中的可靠评估者。
AI.conclusion: LLM在UML类图自动化生成方面具有实际应用潜力，双重验证框架有效评估了LLM的能力和局限性，为LLM驱动的需求工程工作流提供了实用见解。

title: The FABRIC Strategy for Verifying Neural Feedback Systems
summary: Forward reachability analysis is a dominant approach for verifying reach-avoid specifications in neural feedback systems, i.e., dynamical systems controlled by neural networks, and a number of directions have been proposed and studied. In contrast, far less attention has been given to backward reachability analysis for these systems, in part because of the limited scalability of known techniques. In this work, we begin to address this gap by introducing new algorithms for computing both over- and underapproximations of backward reachable sets for nonlinear neural feedback systems. We also describe and implement an integration of these backward reachability techniques with existing ones for forward analysis. We call the resulting algorithm Forward and Backward Reachability Integration for Certification (FaBRIC). We evaluate our algorithms on a representative set of benchmarks and show that they significantly outperform the prior state of the art.

AI.tldr: FaBRIC算法通过结合前向和后向可达性分析来验证神经反馈系统的可达-规避规范，显著优于现有方法
AI.motivation: 神经反馈系统的后向可达性分析研究较少，现有技术可扩展性有限，需要开发更高效的后向可达性分析方法
AI.method: 提出新算法计算非线性神经反馈系统的后向可达集过近似和欠近似，并将后向可达性技术与现有前向分析技术集成，形成FaBRIC算法
AI.result: 在代表性基准测试中，新算法显著优于现有技术水平
AI.conclusion: FaBRIC算法通过整合前向和后向可达性分析，为神经反馈系统的验证提供了更有效的解决方案

title: Meissa: Multi-modal Medical Agentic Intelligence
summary: Multi-modal large language models (MM-LLMs) have shown strong performance in medical image understanding and clinical reasoning. Recent medical agent systems extend them with tool use and multi-agent collaboration, enabling complex decision-making. However, these systems rely almost entirely on frontier models (e.g., GPT), whose API-based deployment incurs high cost, high latency, and privacy risks that conflict with on-premise clinical requirements. We present Meissa, a lightweight 4B-parameter medical MM-LLM that brings agentic capability offline. Instead of imitating static answers, Meissa learns both when to engage external interaction (strategy selection) and how to execute multi-step interaction (strategy execution) by distilling structured trajectories from frontier models. Specifically, we propose: (1) Unified trajectory modeling: trajectories (reasoning and action traces) are represented within a single state-action-observation formalism, allowing one model to generalize across heterogeneous medical environments. (2) Three-tier stratified supervision: the model's own errors trigger progressive escalation from direct reasoning to tool-augmented and multi-agent interaction, explicitly learning difficulty-aware strategy selection. (3) Prospective-retrospective supervision: pairing exploratory forward traces with hindsight-rationalized execution traces enables stable learning of effective interaction policies. Trained on 40K curated trajectories, Meissa matches or exceeds proprietary frontier agents in 10 of 16 evaluation settings across 13 medical benchmarks spanning radiology, pathology, and clinical reasoning. Using over 25x fewer parameters than typical frontier models like Gemini-3, Meissa operates fully offline with 22x lower end-to-end latency compared to API-based deployment. Data, models, and environments are released at https://github.com/Schuture/Meissa.

AI.tldr: Meissa是一个轻量级4B参数医疗多模态大语言模型，通过从前沿模型蒸馏结构化轨迹实现离线智能体能力，在医疗图像理解和临床推理任务中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗智能体系统过度依赖GPT等前沿模型，存在API部署成本高、延迟大、隐私风险等问题，无法满足临床现场部署需求。
AI.method: 提出统一轨迹建模将推理和行动轨迹表示为状态-行动-观察形式；三层分层监督根据模型错误逐步升级策略；前瞻-回顾监督结合探索性前向轨迹和后验合理化执行轨迹。
AI.result: 在13个医疗基准的16个评估设置中，Meissa在10个设置中匹配或超越专有前沿智能体，参数量比Gemini-3等前沿模型少25倍以上，端到端延迟降低22倍。
AI.conclusion: Meissa成功实现了轻量级离线医疗智能体系统，解决了现有系统依赖API部署的成本、延迟和隐私问题，为临床现场部署提供了可行方案。

title: DataFactory: Collaborative Multi-Agent Framework for Advanced Table Question Answering
summary: Table Question Answering (TableQA) enables natural language interaction with structured tabular data. However, existing large language model (LLM) approaches face critical limitations: context length constraints that restrict data handling capabilities, hallucination issues that compromise answer reliability, and single-agent architectures that struggle with complex reasoning scenarios involving semantic relationships and multi-hop logic. This paper introduces DataFactory, a multi-agent framework that addresses these limitations through specialized team coordination and automated knowledge transformation. The framework comprises a Data Leader employing the ReAct paradigm for reasoning orchestration, together with dedicated Database and Knowledge Graph teams, enabling the systematic decomposition of complex queries into structured and relational reasoning tasks. We formalize automated data-to-knowledge graph transformation via the mapping function T:D x S x R -> G, and implement natural language-based consultation that - unlike fixed workflow multi-agent systems - enables flexible inter-agent deliberation and adaptive planning to improve coordination robustness. We also apply context engineering strategies that integrate historical patterns and domain knowledge to reduce hallucinations and improve query accuracy. Across TabFact, WikiTableQuestions, and FeTaQA, using eight LLMs from five providers, results show consistent gains. Our approach improves accuracy by 20.2% (TabFact) and 23.9% (WikiTQ) over baselines, with significant effects (Cohen's d > 1). Team coordination also outperforms single-team variants (+5.5% TabFact, +14.4% WikiTQ, +17.1% FeTaQA ROUGE-2). The framework offers design guidelines for multi-agent collaboration and a practical platform for enterprise data analysis through integrated structured querying and graph-based knowledge representation.

AI.tldr: DataFactory是一个多智能体框架，通过专门的团队协调和自动知识转换解决TableQA中的上下文限制、幻觉问题和单智能体架构不足等挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有大型语言模型在表格问答中存在三个关键限制：上下文长度限制影响数据处理能力、幻觉问题损害答案可靠性、单智能体架构难以处理涉及语义关系和多重逻辑的复杂推理场景。
AI.method: 提出DataFactory多智能体框架，包含采用ReAct范式的数据领导者，以及专门的数据库和知识图谱团队。通过映射函数T:D x S x R -> G实现自动数据到知识图谱的转换，支持自然语言咨询和灵活的多智能体协商。应用上下文工程策略整合历史模式和领域知识。
AI.result: 在TabFact、WikiTableQuestions和FeTaQA数据集上，使用来自五个提供商的八个LLM，结果显示一致提升。在TabFact上准确率提高20.2%，WikiTQ上提高23.9%（Cohen's d > 1）。团队协调优于单团队变体（TabFact +5.5%，WikiTQ +14.4%，FeTaQA ROUGE-2 +17.1%）。
AI.conclusion: DataFactory为多智能体协作提供了设计指南，并通过集成结构化查询和基于图的知识表示，为企业数据分析提供了一个实用平台。

title: Expressivity-Efficiency Tradeoffs for Hybrid Sequence Models
summary: Hybrid sequence models--combining Transformer and state-space model layers--seek to gain the expressive versatility of attention as well as the computational efficiency of state-space model layers. Despite burgeoning interest in hybrid models, we lack a basic understanding of the settings where--and underlying mechanisms through which--they offer benefits over their constituent models. In this paper, we study this question, focusing on a broad family of core synthetic tasks. For this family of tasks, we prove the existence of fundamental limitations for non-hybrid models. Specifically, any Transformer or state-space model that solves the underlying task requires either a large number of parameters or a large working memory. On the other hand, for two prototypical tasks within this family--namely selective copying and associative recall--we construct hybrid models of small size and working memory that provably solve these tasks, thus achieving the best of both worlds. Our experimental evaluation empirically validates our theoretical findings. Importantly, going beyond the settings in our theoretical analysis, we empirically show that learned--rather than constructed--hybrids outperform non-hybrid models with up to 6x as many parameters. We additionally demonstrate that hybrid models exhibit stronger length generalization and out-of-distribution robustness than non-hybrids.

AI.tldr: 混合序列模型（Transformer+状态空间模型）在特定合成任务上能同时获得注意力机制的表达能力和状态空间模型的计算效率，而非混合模型存在参数或内存需求大的根本限制。
AI.motivation: 混合序列模型结合了Transformer和状态空间模型的优势，但缺乏对其在何种场景下、通过何种机制优于单一模型的基本理解。本文旨在系统研究混合模型相对于其组成模型的优势和机制。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明非混合模型在核心合成任务族上的根本局限性，针对选择性复制和关联回忆两个典型任务，构建小型混合模型并理论证明其有效性。同时进行实验验证，包括学习型混合模型与参数更多的非混合模型对比，以及长度泛化和分布外鲁棒性测试。
AI.result: 理论证明：对于特定任务族，任何Transformer或状态空间模型都需要大量参数或工作内存，而混合模型能以小规模解决这些任务。实验验证：学习型混合模型在参数少6倍的情况下仍优于非混合模型，且表现出更强的长度泛化能力和分布外鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 混合序列模型在特定任务上确实能同时获得注意力机制的表达能力和状态空间模型的计算效率，突破了单一模型的根本限制。混合模型不仅在理论构造上有效，实际学习到的混合模型也展现出显著优势，具有更好的泛化能力和鲁棒性。

title: Can ChatGPT Generate Realistic Synthetic System Requirement Specifications? Results of a Case Study
comment: This is the accepted version of a paper that will appear in the proceedings of the 21st International Conference on Evaluation of Novel Approaches of Software Engineering (ENASE 2026). The final published version will be available from Science and Technology Publications (SCITEPRESS). 15 pages, 3 figures, 7 tables
summary: System requirement specifications (SyRSs) are central, natural-language (NL) artifacts. Access to real SyRS for research purposes is highly valuable but limited by proprietary restrictions or confidentiality concerns. Generating synthetic SyRSs (SSyRSs) can address this scarcity. Black-box large language models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT offer compelling generation capabilities by providing easy access to NL generation functions without requiring access to real data. However, LLMs suffer from hallucinations and overconfidence, which pose major challenges in their use. We designed an exploratory study to investigate whether, despite these challenges, we can generate realistic SSyRSs with ChatGPT without having access to real SyRSs. Using a systematic approach that leverages prompt patterns, LLM-based quality assessments, and iterative prompt refinements, we generated 300 SSyRSs across 10 industries with ChatGPT. The results were evaluated using cross-model checks and an expert study, with n=87 submitted surveys. 62\% of experts considered the SSyRSs to be realistic. However, in-depth examination revealed contradictory statements and deficiencies. Overall, we were able to generate realistic SSyRSs to a certain extent with ChatGPT, but LLM-based quality assessments cannot fully replace thorough expert evaluations. This paper presents the methodology and results of our study and discusses the key insights we obtained.

AI.tldr: 研究探索使用ChatGPT生成合成系统需求规格说明书，无需真实数据，通过系统化提示工程生成300份跨行业SSyRS，62%专家认为真实，但存在矛盾陈述和缺陷。
AI.motivation: 真实系统需求规格说明书因专有性和保密性难以获取，而合成生成可解决数据稀缺问题。大型语言模型如ChatGPT提供自然语言生成能力，但存在幻觉和过度自信问题，研究旨在探索是否能在无真实数据情况下生成真实的合成需求规格说明书。
AI.method: 采用系统化方法：利用提示模式、基于LLM的质量评估和迭代提示优化，使用ChatGPT生成300份合成系统需求规格说明书，覆盖10个行业。通过跨模型检查和专家研究（n=87份调查）进行评估。
AI.result: 62%的专家认为生成的合成系统需求规格说明书是真实的。然而深入检查发现存在矛盾陈述和缺陷。基于LLM的质量评估不能完全替代彻底的专家评估。
AI.conclusion: ChatGPT能在一定程度上生成真实的合成系统需求规格说明书，但LLM的质量评估无法完全替代专家评估。研究展示了方法论和关键见解，为合成需求规格生成提供了实践指导。

title: MEMO: Memory-Augmented Model Context Optimization for Robust Multi-Turn Multi-Agent LLM Games
summary: Multi-turn, multi-agent LLM game evaluations often exhibit substantial run-to-run variance. In long-horizon interactions, small early deviations compound across turns and are amplified by multi-agent coupling. This biases win rate estimates and makes rankings unreliable across repeated tournaments. Prompt choice worsens this further by producing different effective policies. We address both instability and underperformance with MEMO (Memory-augmented MOdel context optimization), a self-play framework that optimizes inference-time context by coupling retention and exploration. Retention maintains a persistent memory bank that stores structured insights from self-play trajectories and injects them as priors during later play. Exploration runs tournament-style prompt evolution with uncertainty-aware selection via TrueSkill, and uses prioritized replay to revisit rare and decisive states. Across five text-based games, MEMO raises mean win rate from 25.1% to 49.5% for GPT-4o-mini and from 20.9% to 44.3% for Qwen-2.5-7B-Instruct, using $2,000$ self-play games per task. Run-to-run variance also drops, giving more stable rankings across prompt variations. These results suggest that multi-agent LLM game performance and robustness have substantial room for improvement through context optimization. MEMO achieves the largest gains in negotiation and imperfect-information games, while RL remains more effective in perfect-information settings.

AI.tldr: MEMO框架通过记忆增强和探索优化，解决了多智能体LLM游戏评估中的高方差问题，显著提升了胜率和稳定性
AI.motivation: 多轮多智能体LLM游戏评估存在显著的运行间方差问题，早期微小偏差会通过多智能体耦合在长期交互中被放大，导致胜率估计偏差和排名不可靠，提示选择进一步加剧了这一问题
AI.method: MEMO（记忆增强模型上下文优化）是一个自博弈框架，通过保留和探索的耦合来优化推理时上下文。保留维护持久记忆库存储自博弈轨迹的结构化见解，探索运行锦标赛式提示演化，使用TrueSkill进行不确定性感知选择，并通过优先回放重新访问罕见和决定性状态
AI.result: 在五个文本游戏中，MEMO将GPT-4o-mini的平均胜率从25.1%提升到49.5%，Qwen-2.5-7B-Instruct从20.9%提升到44.3%，运行间方差显著降低，在谈判和不完全信息游戏中获得最大提升
AI.conclusion: 多智能体LLM游戏性能和鲁棒性通过上下文优化有显著提升空间，MEMO在谈判和不完全信息游戏中效果最佳，而在完全信息设置中强化学习仍然更有效

title: A New Modeling to Feature Selection Based on the Fuzzy Rough Set Theory in Normal and Optimistic States on Hybrid Information Systems
comment: 18 pages, 14 figures, 9 tables. Published version available at International Journal of Engineering. This preprint is distributed under CC BY 4.0 license
summary: Considering the high volume, wide variety, and rapid speed of data generation, investigating feature selection methods for big data presents various applications and advantages. By removing irrelevant and redundant features, feature selection reduces data dimensions, thereby facilitating optimal decision-making within decision systems. One of the key tools for feature selection in hybrid information systems is fuzzy rough set theory. However, this theory faces two significant challenges: First, obtaining fuzzy equivalence relations through intersection operations in high-dimensional spaces can be both time-consuming and memory-intensive. Additionally, this method may produce noisy data, complicating the feature selection process. The purpose and innovation of this paper are to address these issues. We proposed a new feature selection model that calculates the combined distance between objects and subsequently used this information to derive the fuzzy equivalence relation. Rather than directly solving the feature selection problem, this approach reformulates it into an optimization problem that can be tackled using appropriate meta-heuristic algorithms. We have named this new approach FSbuHD. The FSbuHD model operates in two modes - normal and optimistic - based on the selection of one of the two introduced fuzzy equivalence relations. The model is then tested on standard datasets from the UCI repository and compared with other algorithms. The results of this research demonstrate that FSbuHD is one of the most efficient and effective methods for feature selection when compared to previous methods and algorithms.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为FSbuHD的新型特征选择模型，通过计算对象间的组合距离来推导模糊等价关系，将特征选择问题转化为优化问题，在高维大数据环境下具有高效性和有效性。
AI.motivation: 针对大数据环境下特征选择的需求，传统模糊粗糙集理论面临两个主要挑战：在高维空间中通过交集运算获取模糊等价关系耗时耗内存，且可能产生噪声数据。本文旨在解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出FSbuHD特征选择模型，通过计算对象间的组合距离来推导模糊等价关系，将特征选择问题重新表述为可用元启发式算法解决的优化问题。模型提供正常和乐观两种模式，基于两种不同的模糊等价关系。
AI.result: 在UCI标准数据集上测试并与其它算法比较，结果表明FSbuHD是相比先前方法最有效和高效的特征选择方法之一。
AI.conclusion: FSbuHD模型成功解决了传统模糊粗糙集理论在高维大数据特征选择中的挑战，通过组合距离方法和优化问题重构，实现了高效且有效的特征选择。

title: Declarative Scenario-based Testing with RoadLogic
comment: Accepted at the 29th ACM International Conference on Hybrid Systems: Computation and Control (HSCC 2026). The final version will appear in the ACM Digital Library
summary:
Scenario-based testing is a key method for cost-effective and safe validation of autonomous vehicles (AVs). Existing approaches rely on imperative scenario definitions, requiring developers to manually enumerate numerous variants to achieve coverage. Declarative languages, such as OpenSCENARIO DSL (OS2), raise the abstraction level but lack systematic methods for instantiating concrete, specification-compliant scenarios as simulations. To our knowledge, currently, no open-source solution provides this capability.
  We present RoadLogic that bridges declarative OS2 specifications and executable simulations. It uses Answer Set Programming to generate abstract plans satisfying scenario constraints, motion planning to refine the plans into feasible trajectories, and specification-based monitoring to verify correctness.
  We evaluate RoadLogic on instantiating representative OS2 scenarios as simulations in the CommonRoad framework. Results show that RoadLogic consistently produces realistic, specification-satisfying simulations within minutes and captures diverse behavioral variants through parameter sampling, thus opening the door to systematic scenario-based testing for autonomous driving systems.

AI.tldr: RoadLogic是一个将声明式OpenSCENARIO DSL场景规范转换为可执行仿真的开源工具，使用答案集编程和运动规划生成符合规范的自动驾驶测试场景。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶场景测试方法依赖命令式定义，需要手动枚举大量变体；声明式语言如OpenSCENARIO DSL缺乏将抽象规范实例化为具体仿真场景的系统方法，目前没有开源解决方案提供此能力。
AI.method: RoadLogic采用三层方法：1) 使用答案集编程生成满足场景约束的抽象计划；2) 通过运动规划将抽象计划细化为可行轨迹；3) 基于规范的监控来验证正确性。
AI.result: 在CommonRoad框架中评估表明，RoadLogic能在几分钟内持续生成符合规范的真实仿真场景，并通过参数采样捕获多样行为变体，为自动驾驶系统基于场景的测试打开了系统化的大门。
AI.conclusion: RoadLogic填补了声明式场景规范与可执行仿真之间的空白，提供了系统化的场景实例化能力，支持自动驾驶场景测试的自动化和多样化。

title: Cross-Domain Uncertainty Quantification for Selective Prediction: A Comprehensive Bound Ablation with Transfer-Informed Betting
summary: We present a comprehensive ablation of nine finite-sample bound families for selective prediction with risk control, combining concentration inequalities (Hoeffding, Empirical Bernstein, Clopper-Pearson, Wasserstein DRO, CVaR) with multiple-testing corrections (union bound, Learn Then Test fixed-sequence) and betting-based confidence sequences (WSR). Our main theoretical contribution is Transfer-Informed Betting (TIB), which warm-starts the WSR wealth process using a source domain's risk profile, achieving tighter bounds in data-scarce settings with a formal dominance guarantee. We prove that the TIB wealth process remains a valid supermartingale under all source-target divergences, that TIB dominates standard WSR when domains match, and that no data-independent warm-start can achieve better convergence. The combination of betting-based confidence sequences, LTT monotone testing, and cross-domain transfer is, to our knowledge, a three-way novelty not present in the literature. We evaluate all nine bound families on four benchmarks-MASSIVE (n=1,102), NyayaBench (n=280), CLINC-150 (n=22.5K), and Banking77 (n=13K)-across 18 (alpha, delta) configurations. On MASSIVE at alpha=0.10, LTT eliminates the ln(K) union-bound penalty, achieving 94.0% guaranteed coverage versus 73.8% for Hoeffding-a 27% relative improvement. On NyayaBench, where the small calibration set makes Hoeffding-family bounds infeasible below alpha=0.20, Transfer-Informed Betting achieves 18.5% coverage at alpha=0.10, a 5.4x improvement over LTT + Hoeffding. We additionally compare with split-conformal prediction, showing that conformal methods produce prediction sets (avg. 1.67 classes) whereas selective prediction provides single-prediction risk guarantees. We apply these methods to agentic caching systems, formalizing a progressive trust model where the guarantee determines when cached responses can be served autonomously.

AI.tldr: 本文对选择性预测的九种有限样本界进行了全面消融研究，提出了基于转移信息的投注方法，在数据稀缺场景下获得更紧的界，并在多个基准测试中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 选择性预测需要在有限样本下提供风险控制保证，现有方法在数据稀缺场景下界过松。本文旨在结合多种技术（集中不等式、多重检验校正、投注置信序列）并引入跨域转移信息，以获得更紧的风险控制界。
AI.method: 结合九种界族：Hoeffding、经验Bernstein、Clopper-Pearson、Wasserstein DRO、CVaR等集中不等式，与多重检验校正（并界、Learn Then Test固定序列）和基于投注的置信序列（WSR）。主要理论贡献是转移信息投注（TIB），利用源域风险配置文件预热WSR财富过程。
AI.result: 在四个基准测试（MASSIVE、NyayaBench、CLINC-150、Banking77）上评估了18种配置。在MASSIVE上，LTT消除了并界惩罚，在α=0.10时获得94.0%保证覆盖率，比Hoeffding的73.8%提高27%。在NyayaBench上，TIB在α=0.10时获得18.5%覆盖率，比LTT+Hoeffding提高5.4倍。
AI.conclusion: TIB方法在数据稀缺场景下显著优于现有方法，提供了形式化的支配保证。结合投注置信序列、LTT单调测试和跨域转移是文献中未见的三重创新。该方法可应用于智能体缓存系统，建立渐进信任模型。

title: Experience Report on the Adaptable Integration of Requirements Engineering Courses into Curricula for Professionals
summary: There is a growing demand for software engineering education (SEE) for professionals because of the increasing demand, active evolution of the technological landscape, and changes in the skills required by the practice. Integrating requirements engineering (RE) courses into SEE curricula for professionals systematically and effectively is challenging. In particular, curricula for professionals have different demands, are more dynamic, and modular in nature. In this study, we report on our experience in the development of three SEE curricula for professionals and the integration of RE courses into such curricula. We suggest basic principles for such integration and describe the systematic approach focused on course content mapping that we have developed.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了如何在面向专业人士的软件工程教育课程中系统有效地整合需求工程课程，提出了基于课程内容映射的系统方法。
AI.motivation: 由于软件工程需求的增长、技术环境的快速演变以及实践所需技能的不断变化，面向专业人士的软件工程教育需求日益增长。然而，将需求工程课程系统有效地整合到面向专业人士的软件工程教育课程中面临挑战，因为这类课程具有需求不同、更加动态和模块化的特点。
AI.method: 研究基于开发三个面向专业人士的软件工程教育课程的经验，提出了整合需求工程课程的基本原理，并开发了一种专注于课程内容映射的系统方法。
AI.result: 研究提出了面向专业人士的软件工程教育课程中整合需求工程课程的基本原则，并开发了基于课程内容映射的系统方法，为类似课程设计提供了实践指导。
AI.conclusion: 通过实际课程开发经验，研究为面向专业人士的软件工程教育课程中需求工程课程的整合提供了系统方法和基本原则，有助于解决这类课程特有的挑战。

title: Quantifying Memorization and Privacy Risks in Genomic Language Models
summary: Genomic language models (GLMs) have emerged as powerful tools for learning representations of DNA sequences, enabling advances in variant prediction, regulatory element identification, and cross-task transfer learning. However, as these models are increasingly trained or fine-tuned on sensitive genomic cohorts, they risk memorizing specific sequences from their training data, raising serious concerns around privacy, data leakage, and regulatory compliance. Despite growing awareness of memorization risks in general-purpose language models, little systematic evaluation exists for these risks in the genomic domain, where data exhibit unique properties such as a fixed nucleotide alphabet, strong biological structure, and individual identifiability. We present a comprehensive, multi-vector privacy evaluation framework designed to quantify memorization risks in GLMs. Our approach integrates three complementary risk assessment methodologies: perplexity-based detection, canary sequence extraction, and membership inference. These are combined into a unified evaluation pipeline that produces a worst-case memorization risk score. To enable controlled evaluation, we plant canary sequences at varying repetition rates into both synthetic and real genomic datasets, allowing precise quantification of how repetition and training dynamics influence memorization. We evaluate our framework across multiple GLM architectures, examining the relationship between sequence repetition, model capacity, and memorization risk. Our results establish that GLMs exhibit measurable memorization and that the degree of memorization varies across architectures and training regimes. These findings reveal that no single attack vector captures the full scope of memorization risk, underscoring the need for multi-vector privacy auditing as a standard practice for genomic AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个全面的多向量隐私评估框架，用于量化基因组语言模型中的记忆风险，结合三种互补的风险评估方法，揭示了GLMs存在可测量的记忆风险，且风险程度因架构和训练方案而异。
AI.motivation: 随着基因组语言模型越来越多地在敏感基因组队列上进行训练或微调，它们存在记忆训练数据中特定序列的风险，这引发了关于隐私、数据泄露和监管合规性的严重担忧。然而，在基因组领域，对这些风险的系统性评估很少，而基因组数据具有独特的特性。
AI.method: 提出了一个全面的多向量隐私评估框架，整合了三种互补的风险评估方法：基于困惑度的检测、金丝雀序列提取和成员推断。这些方法被组合成一个统一的评估流程，产生最坏情况下的记忆风险评分。为了进行受控评估，将金丝雀序列以不同的重复率植入合成和真实的基因组数据集中。
AI.result: 评估结果显示基因组语言模型表现出可测量的记忆，且记忆程度因架构和训练方案而异。研究发现，没有单一的攻击向量能够捕捉到记忆风险的全部范围。
AI.conclusion: 基因组语言模型存在记忆风险，需要多向量隐私审计作为基因组AI系统的标准实践。不同模型架构和训练方案对记忆风险有不同影响，强调了系统性隐私评估的重要性。

title: Towards Viewpoint-centric Artifact-based Regulatory Requirements Engineering for Compliance by Design
summary: Processing regulations and resulting requirements to achieve regulatory compliance in software engineering (SE) is a developing challenge due to the continuously growing amount, complexity, and expanding scope of regulations. Despite the growing amount of newly suggested regulatory requirements engineering (RE) approaches by the research community, industry remains under pressure to assure their integration into their RE and overall software development life cycle (SDLC) practices to facilitate a seamless and legally valid compliance by design. As of today, we still have limited empirical understanding of how this can be achieved. Such integration should avoid additional burdens and address the demands of legal knowledge intensity, cross-functional communication and consistency between different involved viewpoints. Intermediary results of this doctoral study showed that regulatory RE has peculiarities distinguishing it from the engineering of other requirements. Oftentimes, organizations establish standalone regulatory RE processes on the organizational level. However, software development teams usually approach compliance by design in an ad-hoc manner, rather than in a systematic way. Among other, because of the complexity of the coordination between the involved viewpoints. The goal of this paper is to report and get feedback about the synthesis and future evaluation of our Artefact Model for Regulatory Requirements Engineering (AM4RRE) for a integrated compliance by design. We hope this paper will spark discussions about regulatory RE and help us refine plans for the final stage of the doctoral study.

AI.tldr: 该博士研究提出AM4RRE模型，旨在将法规要求工程整合到软件开发中，实现"合规设计"，解决法规复杂性、跨职能沟通和不同视角一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 法规数量和复杂性不断增加，软件工程面临确保合规性的挑战。尽管研究界提出了新的法规要求工程方法，但行业在将其整合到软件开发生命周期中仍面临压力。目前缺乏如何实现这种整合的实证理解，需要解决法律知识密集性、跨职能沟通和不同视角一致性问题。
AI.method: 提出并报告了法规要求工程的人工制品模型（AM4RRE），该模型旨在实现集成化的合规设计。研究采用合成方法，并计划进行未来评估，目前处于寻求反馈和讨论的阶段。
AI.result: 研究发现法规要求工程具有区别于其他要求工程的特殊性。组织通常在组织层面建立独立的法规要求工程流程，但软件开发团队通常以临时方式处理合规设计，而非系统化方式。这主要是由于涉及视角之间的协调复杂性。
AI.conclusion: 本文报告了AM4RRE模型的合成和未来评估计划，旨在引发关于法规要求工程的讨论，帮助完善博士研究的最后阶段。该模型旨在促进法规要求工程与软件开发的整合，实现系统化的合规设计。

title: EmbC-Test: How to Speed Up Embedded Software Testing Using LLMs and RAG
summary: Manual development of automatic tests for embedded C software is a strenuous and time-consuming task that does not scale well. With the accelerating pace of software release cycles, verification increasingly becomes the bottleneck in the embedded development workflow. This paper presents a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline as a solution for partial automation of the verification process. By grounding a large language model in project-specific artifacts, the approach reduces hallucinations and improves project alignment. An industrial evaluation showed that the generated tests are 100 % syntactically correct, with 85 % successfully passing runtime validation. The proposed solution has the potential to save up to 66 % of the testing time compared to manual test writing while generating 270 tests per hour.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于检索增强生成（RAG）的管道，用于部分自动化嵌入式C软件的测试生成，显著减少测试时间并提高效率。
AI.motivation: 嵌入式C软件的手动测试开发耗时费力且难以扩展，随着软件发布周期加快，验证过程成为嵌入式开发流程的瓶颈，需要自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 采用检索增强生成（RAG）管道，将大型语言模型与项目特定工件相结合，减少幻觉并提高项目对齐度，实现测试生成的部分自动化。
AI.result: 工业评估显示生成的测试100%语法正确，85%通过运行时验证，相比手动测试编写可节省高达66%的测试时间，每小时可生成270个测试。
AI.conclusion: RAG管道为嵌入式软件验证提供了有效的部分自动化解决方案，显著提高测试效率和质量，具有实际工业应用价值。

title: The $qs$ Inequality: Quantifying the Double Penalty of Mixture-of-Experts at Inference
summary:
Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models deliver high quality at low training FLOPs, but this efficiency often vanishes at inference. We identify a double penalty that structurally disadvantages MoE architectures during decoding: first, expert routing fragments microbatches and reduces weight reuse; second, massive resident expert pools reduce high-bandwidth memory (HBM) headroom for the KV cache. This phenomenon, formalized as reuse fragmentation, pushes feed-forward networks (FFNs) into a bandwidth-bound regime, especially at long context lengths.
  We introduce the $qs$ inequality, a predictive criterion that identifies when MoE is structurally disadvantaged relative to a quality-matched dense model. This criterion unifies sparsity ($s$), the fraction of parameters activated per token, and the quality-equivalence factor ($q$), the size multiplier required for a dense model to match MoE performance. Our evaluation across frontier models including DeepSeek-V3, Qwen3-235B, Grok-1, and Switch-C demonstrates that this fragmentation is a general architectural phenomenon. For DeepSeek-V3 at 128k context, this results in a 4.5x throughput advantage for a quality-matched dense baseline. Crucially, massive architectures like Switch-C can become infeasible on cluster sizes where a quality-matched dense model remains viable.
  Our results suggest that training-time FLOP efficiency is an incomplete proxy for inference-time performance in long-context serving. They also indicate that MoE may be best viewed as a training-time optimization, with distillation into dense models as a possible path toward inference-efficient deployment.

AI.tldr: MoE模型训练时FLOPs效率高，但推理时因专家路由碎片化和KV缓存占用HBM内存导致效率下降，尤其在长上下文场景下表现更差。
AI.motivation: 研究MoE模型在推理时效率下降的根本原因，特别是识别出专家路由导致的微批次碎片化和KV缓存占用高带宽内存的问题，这些问题在长上下文场景下尤为严重。
AI.method: 提出qs不等式作为预测标准，结合稀疏度s（每个token激活的参数比例）和质量等价因子q（密集模型匹配MoE性能所需的大小倍数），评估MoE相对于密集模型的结构劣势。在DeepSeek-V3、Qwen3-235B、Grok-1和Switch-C等前沿模型上进行评估。
AI.result: MoE模型在推理时存在重用碎片化问题，导致FFN进入带宽受限状态。DeepSeek-V3在128k上下文长度下，质量匹配的密集模型吞吐量优势达到4.5倍。Switch-C等大规模架构在集群规模上可能变得不可行，而质量匹配的密集模型仍可行。
AI.conclusion: 训练时的FLOPs效率不能完全代表推理时的性能，特别是在长上下文服务中。MoE最好被视为训练时优化技术，通过蒸馏到密集模型可能是实现推理高效部署的可行路径。

title: Preparing Students for AI-Driven Agile Development: A Project-Based AI Engineering Curriculum
summary: Generative AI and agentic tools are reshaping agile software development, yet many engineering curricula still teach agile methods and AI competencies separately and largely lecture-based. This paper presents a project-based AI Engineering curriculum designed to prepare students for AI-driven agile development by integrating agile practices and AI-enabled engineering throughout the program. We contribute (1) the curriculum concept and guiding principles, (2) a case study of interdisciplinary, AI-enabled agile student projects, and (3) early evidence from a mixed-methods evaluation. In our case study, second-semester bachelor students work in teams over seven two-week sprints on a realistic software product. AI tools are embedded into everyday agile engineering tasks - requirements clarification, backlog refinement, architectural reasoning, coding support, testing, and documentation - paired with reflection on human responsibility and quality. Initial results indicate that the integrated approach supports hands-on competence development in AI-assisted engineering. Key observations highlight the need for agile teaching adaptations due to rapid tool evolution, the critical role of oral verification to ensure foundational learning. We close with lessons learned and recommendations for educators designing agile project-based curricula in the age of AI.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于项目的AI工程课程，将敏捷实践与AI工具整合，培养学生在AI驱动的敏捷开发中的能力。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI和智能工具正在重塑敏捷软件开发，但许多工程课程仍将敏捷方法和AI能力分开教学，且主要以讲座形式进行，需要整合的教学方法。
AI.method: 设计了项目驱动的AI工程课程，将AI工具嵌入日常敏捷工程任务中，包括需求澄清、待办事项优化、架构推理、编码支持、测试和文档等环节，并配合人类责任和质量反思。
AI.result: 初步结果表明，这种整合方法支持了AI辅助工程的实际能力发展。关键观察强调了敏捷教学需要适应快速工具演变，口头验证对确保基础学习至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 论文提供了课程设计经验和建议，帮助教育工作者在AI时代设计基于项目的敏捷课程，强调整合AI与敏捷实践的重要性。

title: Deep Tabular Research via Continual Experience-Driven Execution
summary: Large language models often struggle with complex long-horizon analytical tasks over unstructured tables, which typically feature hierarchical and bidirectional headers and non-canonical layouts. We formalize this challenge as Deep Tabular Research (DTR), requiring multi-step reasoning over interdependent table regions. To address DTR, we propose a novel agentic framework that treats tabular reasoning as a closed-loop decision-making process. We carefully design a coupled query and table comprehension for path decision making and operational execution. Specifically, (i) DTR first constructs a hierarchical meta graph to capture bidirectional semantics, mapping natural language queries into an operation-level search space; (ii) To navigate this space, we introduce an expectation-aware selection policy that prioritizes high-utility execution paths; (iii) Crucially, historical execution outcomes are synthesized into a siamese structured memory, i.e., parameterized updates and abstracted texts, enabling continual refinement. Extensive experiments on challenging unstructured tabular benchmarks verify the effectiveness and highlight the necessity of separating strategic planning from low-level execution for long-horizon tabular reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出DTR框架解决大语言模型在复杂非结构化表格上的长时程分析任务，通过分层元图、期望感知选择策略和孪生结构化记忆实现闭环决策
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在处理具有分层双向表头和非规范布局的复杂非结构化表格时表现不佳，需要解决长时程表格推理的挑战
AI.method: 提出DTR框架：1)构建分层元图捕捉双向语义；2)引入期望感知选择策略优先高效用执行路径；3)使用孪生结构化记忆（参数化更新和抽象文本）持续优化
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的非结构化表格基准测试中验证了有效性，证明了将战略规划与低级执行分离对长时程表格推理的必要性
AI.conclusion: DTR框架通过将表格推理视为闭环决策过程，有效解决了复杂非结构化表格的长时程分析问题，为表格推理提供了新的解决方案

title: Semantic Level of Detail: Multi-Scale Knowledge Representation via Heat Kernel Diffusion on Hyperbolic Manifolds
summary: AI memory systems increasingly organize knowledge into graph structures -- knowledge graphs, entity relations, community hierarchies -- yet lack a principled mechanism for continuous resolution control: where do the qualitative boundaries between abstraction levels lie, and how should an agent navigate them? We introduce Semantic Level of Detail (SLoD), a framework that answers both questions by defining a continuous zoom operator via heat kernel diffusion on the Poincaré ball $\mathbb{B}^d$. At coarse scales ($σ\to \infty$), diffusion aggregates embeddings into high-level summaries; at fine scales ($σ\to 0$), local semantic detail is preserved. We prove hierarchical coherence with bounded approximation error $O(σ)$ and $(1+\varepsilon)$ distortion for tree-structured hierarchies under Sarkar embedding. Crucially, we show that spectral gaps in the graph Laplacian induce emergent scale boundaries -- scales where the representation undergoes qualitative transitions -- which can be detected automatically without manual resolution parameters. On synthetic hierarchies (HSBM), our boundary scanner recovers planted levels with ARI up to 1.00, with detection degrading gracefully near the information-theoretic Kesten-Stigum threshold. On the full WordNet noun hierarchy (82K synsets), detected boundaries align with true taxonomic depth ($τ= 0.79$), demonstrating that the method discovers meaningful abstraction levels in real-world knowledge graphs without supervision.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了语义细节层次（SLoD）框架，通过双曲空间中的热核扩散实现连续分辨率控制，自动检测知识图谱中的抽象层次边界。
AI.motivation: 当前AI记忆系统将知识组织成图结构（知识图谱、实体关系、社区层次），但缺乏连续分辨率控制的原理性机制，无法确定抽象层次之间的定性边界以及智能体应如何在这些层次间导航。
AI.method: 引入语义细节层次（SLoD）框架，通过在庞加莱球上的热核扩散定义连续缩放算子。在粗尺度上，扩散将嵌入聚合成高级摘要；在细尺度上，保留局部语义细节。证明了树状层次结构在Sarkar嵌入下的层次一致性和有界近似误差。利用图拉普拉斯算子的谱间隙自动检测表示发生定性转变的尺度边界。
AI.result: 在合成层次结构（HSBM）上，边界扫描器恢复植入的层次，调整兰德指数高达1.00，在信息论Kesten-Stigum阈值附近检测性能逐渐下降。在完整WordNet名词层次结构（82K同义词集）上，检测到的边界与真实分类深度高度相关（τ=0.79），表明该方法能在无监督情况下发现真实世界知识图谱中有意义的抽象层次。
AI.conclusion: SLoD框架为知识图谱提供了连续分辨率控制的原理性机制，能够自动检测抽象层次边界，无需手动分辨率参数，在合成和真实世界知识图谱中都表现出色。

title: An Empirical Study of Interaction Smells in Multi-Turn Human-LLM Collaborative Code Generation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized code generation, evolving from static tools into dynamic conversational interfaces that facilitate complex, multi-turn collaborative programming. While LLMs exhibit remarkable proficiency in generating standalone code snippets, they often struggle to maintain contextual consistency during extended interactions, creating significant obstacles in the collaboration process. Existing benchmarks primarily emphasize the functional correctness of the final output, overlooking latent quality issues within the interaction process itself, which we term Interaction Smells. In this paper, we conduct an empirical study on sampled real-word user-LLM interactions from WildChat and LMSYS-Chat-1M datasets to systematically investigate Interaction Smells in human-LLM code generation tasks from the perspectives of phenomena, distribution, and mitigation. First, we establish the first taxonomy of Interaction Smells by manually performing open card sorting on real-world interaction logs. This taxonomy categorizes Interaction Smells into three primary categories, i.e., User Intent Quality, Historical Instruction Compliance, and Historical Response Violation, comprising nine specific subcategories. Next, we quantitatively evaluate six mainstream LLMs (i.e., GPT-4o, DeepSeek-Chat, Gemini 2.5, Qwen2.5-32B, Qwen2.5-72B, and Qwen3-235B-a22b) to analyze the distribution of Interaction Smells across different models. Finally, we propose Invariant-aware Constraint Evolution (InCE), a multi-agent framework designed to improve multi-turn interaction quality through explicit extraction of global invariants and pre-generation quality audits. Experimental results on the extended WildBench benchmark demonstrate that this lightweight mitigation approach significantly improves the Task Success Rate and effectively suppresses the occurrence of Interaction Smells.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了LLM在代码生成多轮交互中的"交互异味"问题，提出了首个分类法，分析了主流模型的异味分布，并提出了InCE框架来改善交互质量。
AI.motivation: 虽然LLM在代码生成方面表现出色，但在多轮交互中难以保持上下文一致性，现有基准主要关注最终输出的功能正确性，忽视了交互过程中的潜在质量问题（即"交互异味"）。
AI.method: 1. 从WildChat和LMSYS-Chat-1M数据集中采样真实用户-LLM交互进行实证研究；2. 通过开放卡片分类建立首个交互异味分类法；3. 定量评估6个主流LLM的异味分布；4. 提出InCE多智能体框架，通过显式提取全局不变性和预生成质量审计来改善交互质量。
AI.result: 1. 建立了包含3个主要类别（用户意图质量、历史指令遵从性、历史响应违反）和9个子类别的交互异味分类法；2. 分析了GPT-4o、DeepSeek-Chat等6个主流LLM的异味分布；3. 在扩展的WildBench基准测试中，InCE框架显著提高了任务成功率并有效抑制了交互异味的出现。
AI.conclusion: 交互异味是LLM代码生成协作中的重要问题，需要系统性的研究和缓解策略。提出的InCE框架通过多智能体协作和显式约束管理，能够有效改善多轮交互质量，为未来LLM协作系统设计提供了重要参考。
